GalaxaStore
Logo Colors Typography Spacing Components GT vs GS
🛒 Brand Guidelines — v1

Built to sell.
Designed to convert.

Complete visual identity for GalaxaStore — Galaxa Tech's e-commerce storefront. Dark, fast, aggressive. Built for gamers and tech buyers.

00 — Mark

Logo

Shopping-bag + ribbon-G mark. Instantly communicates "store" while inheriting the Galaxa G-ribbon DNA from the parent brand.

Dark voidPrimary — on #08060A base
Dark maroonAcceptable — hero / CTA sections
Light bg⚠️ Needs white-bg variant — current mark has dark bg baked in

Logo Gradient Anatomy

#5A160F · Shadow #AA1E12 · Core red #CD381D · Mid warm #E04420 · Highlight

Clear Space

Minimum clear space = 14% of icon width on all sides.
Never crowd the mark with text or other graphics inside this zone.

✓ Do

  • Use on dark backgrounds (#08060A, #100C1A, #1A0A08) only
  • Maintain clear space ≥ 14% of mark width all sides
  • Scale proportionally — never distort aspect ratio
  • Icon-only (no wordmark) at ≤ 32px / favicon / app icon

✗ Don't

  • Place on mid-grey or white backgrounds without a light-mode variant
  • Apply extra drop shadows or glows on top of the mark
  • Recolor the gradient — it's logo-locked, not a UI gradient
  • Use below 24×24px for any visible context
Action item: Request a transparent-background PNG and a flat single-color (white) SVG variant from ChatGPT/designer — the current export has the dark background baked in, which blocks use on light surfaces and over photos.
01 — Foundation

Color System

All red values are pixel-extracted from the actual logo — not guessed. Red is the conversion signal. Use it only on CTAs, prices, badges, and the logo itself.

Backgrounds
Void
#08060A
Body · primary bg · matches logo bg
Surface
#100C1A
Sections · footer
Card
#16101E
Product cards
Card Alt
#1E1428
Image wells · inputs
Red Scale — extracted from logo gradient
Red Shadow
#5A160F
Logo shadow only
Red Core
#AA1E12
Primary CTA, logo base
Red Mid
#BB2D19
Hover states
Red Bright
#CD381D
Price text, highlights
Red-Orange
#E04420
Gradient end · highlights
Text & Borders
Text Primary
#F4F1F8
Headings, titles
Text Secondary
#A89EB8
Body, descriptions
Text Muted
#6E6480
Captions, disabled
Border Card
#FFFFFF1A
Card borders

Gradients

Primary — 135deg (CTA, buttons)
Badge — 90deg (Hot Selling)
Logo — full 4-stop scale
Hero bg — 180deg fade
02 — Voice

Typography

Three fonts with exclusive roles. Rajdhani handles all retail-facing copy — prices, CTAs, badges, the wordmark. Sora owns headings. Inter handles everything else.

Display / Headings
Sora
400 · 600 · 700 · 800
Page titles, section headers, hero
Body / UI
Inter
400 · 500 · 600 · 700
Descriptions, specs, nav links
Retail / Aggressive
Rajdhani
500 · 600 · 700
Prices · CTAs · Badges · Wordmark
Type Scale
Aa GalaxaStore56px · Sora 800
Aa GalaxaStore36px · Sora 700
Aa GalaxaStore24px · Sora 600
৳ 12,879Price · Rajdhani 700 · red-bright
Product description body text16px · Inter 400 · leading 1.5
Category · Spec · Caption · Review14px · Inter 400 · muted
🔥 HOT SELLING · BADGE LABEL11px · JetBrains Mono
03 — Structure

Spacing & Layout

4px base unit. All spacing, gaps, and radii must be multiples of 4.

📐
Container max-width1200px · 24px side padding
🔲
Product grid4-col desktop · 2-col tablet · 1-col mobile
📏
Section rhythm60px vertical · 36px between blocks
Radius Scale
4px · Tag/chip
8px · Buttons
10px · Product card
12px · Search / panels
16px · Feature card
22px · App icon
999px · Pills

05 — Distinction

GalaxaTech vs GalaxaStore

Same parent. Two separate visual identities. Never mix their tokens.

AttributeGalaxaTech (Agency)GalaxaStore (E-commerce)
PurposeDigital agency, services, projectsProduct retail, hardware storefront
Primary accent#EC1E8E · Pink#AA1E12 → #E04420 · Red scale
Logo style3D ribbon-fold G (pink-orange)Shopping bag + G-ribbon (red-orange)
Display fontSora — premium, editorialSora + Rajdhani — aggressive retail
Card styleGlassmorphism (blur + glass fill)Flat dark card (no blur)
CTA language"Start your project / Let's build""Add to Cart / Buy Now / Shop"
Background base#0B0710 — warm dark purple#08060A — cool near-black
Gradient directionPink → Orange (135deg)Dark Red → Red-Orange (135deg)
Hard rule: If you're building GalaxaStore UI and reach for #EC1E8E — stop. That belongs to GalaxaTech only. The store runs on red.
GalaxaStore Brand Guidelines v1 · A Galaxa Tech sub-brand · Internal use only
